mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, status, priority, created_by, source, tag_id, planned_completion_date, actual_completion_date, task_id, created_at, updated_at FROM requirements WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, description, status, priority, created_by, source, tag_id, planned_completion_date, actual_completion_date, task_id, created_at, updated_at FROM requirements ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO requirements (name, description, status, priority, created_by, source, tag_id, planned_completion_date, actual_completion_date, task_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{createdBy}, #{source}, #{tagId}, #{plannedCompletionDate}, #{actualCompletionDate}, #{taskId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE requirements SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, source = #{source}, tag_id = #{tagId}, planned_completion_date = #{plannedCompletionDate}, actual_completion_date = #{actualCompletionDate}, task_id = #{taskId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM requirements WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM requirements WHERE status = '已完成' AND DATE(actual_completion_date) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
